usage_rules.headings: Use Space Grotesk for all H1-H3. Tracking tight (-0.02em). Weight 600 or 700 for impact.
usage_rules.body: Use Manrope for all UI text. High legibility. Weight 400 for body, 500 for labels.
usage_rules.buttons: Manrope, Weight 600, Uppercase tracking-wide for primary actions.

gradients.hero_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-white to-white/50

layout_strategies.general: Use 'Bento' grids. Avoid simple columns. Use generous padding (p-8, p-12).
layout_strategies.hero_section: Mode A: Tetris Grid. Large abstract visual (col-span-8), punchy headline (col-span-4).
layout_strategies.dashboard: Mode B: High Density. Sidebar navigation. Main content area with glassmorphic panels.
layout_strategies.video_generator: Split view: Script Input (Left, 40%) vs Preview/Settings (Right, 60%). Sticky preview.

buttons.primary: h-12 px-8 rounded-full bg-primary text-white font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-primary/25 transition-all
buttons.secondary: h-12 px-8 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all

cards.style: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-primary/20 h-12 rounded-lg

hero_background.description: Abstract blue wavy lines on black background

feature_creator.description: Man with beard holding cell phone

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts link to public/index.html immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to use the 'Space Grotesk' and 'Manrope' font families.
3. SET THEME: Update src/index.css with the provided CSS variables for the Dark Mode 'Performance Pro' theme.
4. USE SHADCN: Use the existing components in src/components/ui but style them using the 'visual_enhancers' rules (glassmorphism, borders).
5. LAYOUT: Implement the 'Video Generator' page with a split-screen layout (Script vs Preview).
6. IMAGES: Use the provided image URLs for the Landing Page and placeholders.
7. ANIMATION: Add 'framer-motion' for smooth transitions between steps (Script -> Voice -> Media -> Preview).
8. CRITICAL: Ensure all text has high contrast against the dark background. Use text-gray-400 for secondary text, text-white for primary.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
